title: Yan Diomandé: Arsenal, Liverpool, and PSG Transfer News
description: According to Goal.com, Arsenal has joined the race for a £102m target. Football365 reports a new transfer plan could affect a Liverpool deal.

sources.title: Arsenal join the race for £102m Liverpool & PSG target after missing out on Morgan Rogers to Chelsea in record-breaking £117m transfer
New Diomande transfer plan could kill Barcola to Liverpool deal as Romano gives update
Arsenal Are Showing Interest In This Bundesliga Talent: Should Arteta Move In For Him?

sections.heading: Arsenal's Transfer Activity
paragraphs: According to Goal.com, Arsenal has joined the race for a £102m target who is also wanted by Liverpool and PSG. This interest comes after Arsenal missed out on Morgan Rogers to Chelsea in a record-breaking £117m transfer. Furthermore, The 4th Official reports that Arsenal is showing interest in a Bundesliga talent.

sections.heading: Liverpool and Diomande Updates
paragraphs: Football365 reports that a new transfer plan regarding Diomande could kill a deal that would send Barcola to Liverpool. The report also mentions that Fabrizio Romano has provided an update on the situation.

sections.heading: Search Interest Data
paragraphs: Google Trends data indicates that the search term 'yan diomandé' has a reported search lower bound of 1,000 in the GB region. This metric reflects the volume of searches for this specific term relative to total search activity.

faq.q: Which clubs are reportedly interested in the player?
faq.a: According to Goal.com, Arsenal, Liverpool, and PSG are interested in the player.

faq.q: What is the reported value of the transfer target?
faq.a: Goal.com reports that the target is valued at £102m.

faq.q: How does the Diomande plan affect Liverpool?
faq.a: According to Football365, a new Diomande transfer plan could potentially kill a deal involving Barcola moving to Liverpool.
